channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: The Critters Pack 1.22
item.description: Updated fork of the critters pack with chiappo's approval.

item.title: Collodion -- Classic Photography
item.description: Save scenes from your world onto wet plates and develop them into photos to decorate your home with!

item.title: Freshness Overlay
item.description: Shows freshness of food and hides.

item.title: Butterfly Cases - Reborn
item.description: Adds display cases for displaying butterflies!

item.title: Modular Backpacks
item.description: Makes vanilla backpacks modular, allowing you to attach addons to extend storage slots.

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: WeatherStory
item.description: dynamic/stateful climate system based on chunk/region-derived wind, humidity, temperature, pressure

item.title: Shelf Obsessed
item.description: Put more things on bookshelves and more. When in doubt, put it on the shelf!

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: Item Collect Mode Keybind
item.description: Adds a keybind for quickly changing the item collect mode.

item.title: ReelMower
item.description: Push reel mower. Cut grass, Multiplayer in testing

item.title: Eternal Seraph Patch
item.description: Патч для серверу Вічний Серафим. Patch for the server Eternal Seraph.

item.title: Purposeful Storage Metalbits Patch
item.description: Store metal bits in your Purposeful Storage bins!

item.title: rawNature
item.description: Adds materials, recipes, items, and a new balance of things to the game

item.title: Rustbound Magic
item.description: Adds magic to Vintage Story.

item.title: Builder's Cannon - WIP
item.description: Capture structures as schematics and rebuild/share them online

item.title: Smart Firepit
item.description: A mod that makes cooking, smithing, and flint firing easier.

item.title: Advanced Chat
item.description: A fully customizable, movable, resizable chat overlay for Vintage Story. Take control of your chat w

item.title: Sacred Classes
item.description: A collection of new and improved classes for multiplayer

item.title: TinkerTailor - Backpacks
item.description: More backpacks & pouches for the veteran seraph. Made with love & pain, No AI.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Recycle Armors
item.description: Recycle metal armors back to thier base components.

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Frontier's Map
item.description: Adds a physical map with built-in map maker system, drawing tools and over 130 hand drawn stamps

item.title: Enhanced Thunder Sounds
item.description: Adds random sound variety to thunder — no more hearing the same 4 claps on repeat.

item.title: Wanderer's Sketchbook - Drawing Tablet Patch
item.description: Adds better drawing tablet integration and pressure sensitivity to Wanderer's Sketchbook mod

item.title: ToE Patches
item.description: A collection of all patches for the ToE Server

item.title: Paddy Fields
item.description: Adds the Ta-kuwa hoe and Paddy Fields for more accurate rice farming.

item.title: Still Greenhouses
item.description: Stops wind sway for greenhouse vegetation.

item.title: Player Model lib
item.description: Library for adding new player races
